channel.title: INtopBackup
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INtopBackup, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: How Nazgul the wolfdog made his run for Winter Olympic glory in Italy
item.description: Nazgul isn't talking, but his owners come clean about how he got loose, got famous, and how they feel now

item.title: US military airlifts small reactor as Trump pushes to quickly deploy nuclear power
item.description: The Pentagon and the Energy Department have airlifted a small nuclear reactor from California to Utah, demonstrating what they say is potential for th...

item.title: Opinion: The enduring dignity of Jesse Jackson
item.description: Rev. Jesse Jackson died this week at age 84. NPR's Scott Simon remembers covering Jackson's 1984 presidential campaign in Mississippi.

item.title: Court clears way for Louisiana law requiring Ten Commandments in classrooms to take effect
item.description: The 5th U.S. Circuit Court of Appeals has cleared the way for a Louisiana law requiring displays of the Ten Commandments in public classrooms to take ...

item.title: From cubicles to kitchens: How empty offices are becoming homes
item.description: Many U.S. cities have too many office buildings and not enough homes. Developers are now converting some old offices into apartments and condos, but i...

item.title: Avalanches kill five in Austrian Alps, officials say
item.description: A man skiing with his son was among the victims on Friday, bringing the region's avalanche death toll this season to at least 21.

item.title: Italian toddler dies after transplant with heart 'burned by frostbite'
item.description: The heart given to two-year-old Domenico was reportedly severely damaged during its transfer to hospital.

item.title: Saturday Sessions: Say She She performs "Cut & Rewind"
item.description: Say She She has been on a meteoric rise since their 2022 debut, playing major festivals and selling out venues around the world. The disco-funk group ...

item.title: Katseye's Manon to take 'temporary hiatus' to focus on health
item.description: The six-person girl group say the decision was made following "open and thoughtful conversations together".

item.title: Trump brings in new 10% tariff as Supreme Court rejects his global import taxes
item.description: The Supreme Court decision striking down some of Trump's most sweeping tariffs injects new uncertainty into global trade.

item.title: Why the Supreme Court struck down Trump's most sweeping tariffs
item.description: The Supreme Court divided 6-3 in finding that a federal law known as IEEPA does not authorize the president to impose tariffs.

item.title: This week on "Sunday Morning" (Feb. 22)
item.description: A look at the features for this week's broadcast of the Emmy-winning program, hosted by Jane Pauley.

item.title: Saturday Sessions: Say She She performs "Under the Sun"
item.description: Say She She has been on a meteoric rise since their 2022 debut, playing major festivals and selling out venues around the world. The disco-funk group ...

item.title: ICE is quietly buying warehouses for detention centers and leaving local officials out of the loop
Israeli strikes kill at least 10 in Lebanon, officials say
item.description: The strikes are among the deadliest in Lebanon since a ceasefire ended the war between Israel and Hezbollah.

item.title: Saturday Sessions: Say She She performs "Disco Life"
item.description: Say She She has been on a meteoric rise since their 2022 debut, playing major festivals and selling out venues around the world. The disco-funk group ...

item.title: All truckers and bus drivers will be required to take commercial driverâs license tests in English
Supreme Court strikes down Trumpâs sweeping tariffs, sparking fierce pushback and vow of new levies
item.description: President Donald Trump says heâs imposing a temporary global tariff of 10% after his far-reaching tariff regimen was struck down by the Supreme Court.
